title: Daily CM Standup to discuss progress and blockers
meeting_title: Daily CM Standup to discuss progress and blockers

transcript.text: Yes, he did.
Yeah, so it sounds like I can just continue doing what I was doing, but then for these ones in particular, must mention the ebook.
these, yeah, for all the articles that are out of this campaign where it says data as a team support, they just want to promote that thing.
So I've just crossed it off the list of Notion.
And other than that, I think it's a good.
I've looked up, like I did a lot of digging into their data yesterday.
Their traffic seems to be going down just a little bit, but I think it's going to be consistent with June because we still have like two full days to go in July.
And their traffic is pretty close to what it was.
So overall traffic is going to pretty much remain the same.
And I found that there's some issues with the mobile version of their website.
Yeah, think that will definitely be making it.
Yeah.
Yeah, I was very impressed by that.
The message you sent, that was great.
Yeah, there was absolutely nothing.
Usually, when traffic goes down, you can see, oh, this blog post has gone down significantly, or this has stopped getting clicks, or you can detect what's wrong.
But there was nothing out of the auditory.
So I have to go into Looker, then GA4, then search, then finally I found it in search console.
But the thing is, I don't think that's the cause of a drop in traffic either, because it's not a new thing.
If it was there, it has been there for months.
Yeah.
But fixing it should improve their traffic for now, I think.
And I think the core updates may have something to do with it, so we'll probably keep an eye on.
Yeah, that's what I was thinking as well.
We haven't changed anything that's been consistently going up.
I feel like it's not something we did.
Yeah, well, very interesting.
I wanted to ask you, said, Jess left.
I had no idea she was leaving.
That was last Friday.
Yeah, so she's no longer with the company.
Okay.
Alrighty.
And, yeah, so you just have, like, you just have prophecy articles.
I will also, like, so I'm working on the meeting agenda for AIMBIT right now.
After that, I'll propose new prophecy articles, and they will be around the whole, what are AI agents and all the top of the bundle, stuff like that.
Okay, great.
So I'm going to put that in so we can cross that up on list.
We weren't able to find if there were any bots or anything.
We weren't able to find them.
Sorry, we weren't able to find if?
So in the last meeting, they said, can you find if any bots are hitting our website?
Oh, I was a bit like that request.
I was like, I don't think you're going to find anything, but at least you said you looked and you couldn't find.

Yeah, usually bots come, like there's a massive surge, and it goes up, like there's a massive spike, and they're all coming from one place, so then you can say, okay, that's a bot, yeah, but there's nothing like that in there.
Yeah, okay, well, that's good at least.

Yeah, I'm just, I'm working through the topics, I've done like the outlines of most of them, and then I might, the one article I'm just a little bit unsure of, the best practices one, but I will just create like the outline for that one, and then just send it to you to like, just check if it's okay, and then I'll do the generating.

I'm just so irritated with like, so I'm using Claude, because Daryl said I must use Claude, this batch of articles, I don't know what Atlas is doing, but last week the outlines from Atlas were pretty good, this week the outlines are not so good, I have submitted a few tickets about stuff, so I'm using Claude, but I don't know.

If you've encountered this issue, but like when you're writing and let's say you like ask it to make a section and then you want to create like a similar section and it just uses the exact same like sentence structure and getting it to change that is so frustrating because like you obviously don't want like, you know, data thing is this, this, this, it does this, this, this, and then the next session is like the exact same structure.
So I'm just fighting, but I'll, I'll get there eventually once I get like a.
is that like, is, is Claude doing it or is Atlas doing it?
You notice, no, that's Claude.
I've noticed like most LLMs if you like tell it to do one thing to one section or just apply that logic to everything.
Yeah, makes me mad.
Oh, so, so you're doing it in Canvas, right?
Like when it goes into that big screen.
Yes.
So what I usually do is I just ask it to just give me the stuff in, in replies and don't make changes to Canvas Direct.
Oh, okay.
Yeah, because, because I've seen it, they go a bit wonky.
Even chat GPT goes a bit wonky.
key in Canvas, but if you just say, just give me the reply, I'll just copy-paste it, and we're documenting.
Okay, I think I won't do that, because it's getting quite irritating.
Yeah, that works.
And I saw their feedback on that document as well.
I think it's pretty actionable.
You can just apply the things that they've recommended and just say, I've applied.
Yeah, I'll probably do that at the end of the week once I've done these articles.
Yeah, and then I was chatting to Daryl about the publishing.
It sounds like we're getting somewhere with the publishing, because I've tried multiple times this week to stay.
Some of the blogs, and it just kicks me out every single time, even when I do it in the morning.
So, kind of gave up on that.
I'm hoping that Daryl can get that sorted.
So, yeah, that sounds promising.
Yeah, I think that's all for me.
Okay, yeah, have a productive day.
don't know if will be joining us.
Yeah.
All right, have a productive day.
Cool, thanks, Ehtisha.
later.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss progress, blockers, and updates on content marketing activities for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic slightly down but expected to remain consistent with June; mobile website issues discovered](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [New prophecy articles planned around AI agents and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Content creation challenges with Claude AI, but workarounds discussed](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Publishing issues persist, but solutions are in progress with Daryl](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Continuing current approach, with emphasis on mentioning ebook for "data as a team support" campaign articles](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New prophecy articles planned, focusing on AI agents and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Saskia working through topic outlines, with slight uncertainty on "best practices" article](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Traffic Analysis

  - [July traffic slightly down but expected to match June (2 days remaining in July)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [No significant drops in individual blog posts or click rates detected](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Mobile version of website has some issues, potentially impacting traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Core updates may be affecting traffic; team to monitor closely](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Technical Investigations

  - [Extensive data digging performed (Looker, GA4, Search Console)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [No bot activity detected on the website (addressing client concern from previous meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Mobile website issues discovered, fixing could improve traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Claude AI (mandated by Daryl) producing repetitive sentence structures](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Ehtisham suggested using Claude for replies only, not direct Canvas edits](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Saskia to implement feedback on previous document at week's end](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Publishing Issues

  - [Persistent problems with publishing blogs, Saskia unable to stay logged in](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Daryl working on a solution, progress seems promising](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Jess has left the company (as of last Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to continue working on article outlines and generation](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Ehtisham to propose new prophecy articles after completing AIMBIT meeting agenda](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Monitor traffic closely, especially in relation to core updates](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Implement feedback on previous document (Saskia, end of week)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Follow up with Daryl on publishing issue resolution](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Saskia to send "best practices" article outline to Ehtisham for review before generating content](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

action_items.description: Send outline of "best practices" article to Ehtisham for review before generating content
Use Claude in reply mode instead of Canvas for article generation to avoid repetitive structures
